texto: I have some NASA memorabilia from the early Apollo days that I can't imagine parting with. I've always wanted to play sort of like a space cowboy, too, like the idea of Captain Kirk. I think that's everybody's dream though, right?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Matthew Daddario: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “I have some NASA memorabilia from the early Apollo days that I can't imagine parting with. I've a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, dream, think pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de think e play.

frase_original: I have some NASA memorabilia from the early Apollo days that I can't imagine parting with. I've always wanted to play sort of like a space cowboy, too, like the idea of Captain Kirk. I think that's everybody's dream though, right?
